title: Munchkin Floating Farm Animal Themed Rubber Bath Squirt Toys for Baby, Pack of 8
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Eight farmyard friends help teach animals and noises in the bath
Easy for little hands to grasp and squeeze
description: From the manufacturer Add These Farm Friends To Your Bathtime Mix And Watch The Adventures Unfold Old MacDonald had a farm, and now your little one does too! Bring farm-inspired fun to the tub with our 8pk Squirtin' Farmyard Friends. This fun 8 pack of bath squirts includes a chicken, sheep, cow, pig, horse, owl, duck and frog. Help baby develop fine motor skills while learning to identify animal names and sounds! These brightly-coloured farm bath toys float, squirt water, and are sized just right for little hands to grasp and squeeze. They're also durable, so you don't have to worry about chipping or breaking. Our innovative designs, and great values are why Munchkin products are top sellers all around the world. We believe that snacking should be fun, and each mealtime is a great way to connect with baby. Munchkin's range of Best-Selling Miracle 360° Cups are a household must-have - These revolutionary spoutless sippy and trainer cups allow babies and toddlers to drink from anywhere around the rim, just like a regular cup, with a completely spill-proof design. The spoutless 360° rim is dentist recommended because it supports normal muscle development in a child's mouth. Brica by Munchkin offers parents smart solutions for travelling with little ones, making journeys safer and more enjoyable for parents and kids. Whether you are in the car, pushing a pushchair or visiting grandma, we have what you need to gear up and head out. Munchkin's here to help lull your little one to dreamland with our collection of soothers, white noise machines, nightlights, and toddler bed rails—you both will sleep soundly knowing your baby is comforted by sweet sleep sounds and cosy comforts. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For your child's safety and health. Warning: to prevent drowning keep children within arm's reach. Inspect before use. Discard and replace at the first sign of damage or weakness. Always check temperature of water before placing child in bath. This product should not be used as a teether and should be used under adult supervision only. Do not leave child unattended. Please read and retain this information for future reference. Remove all packaging components before giving to a child.
